title: lasiorrhiza gossypina
intro: Lasiorrhiza gossypina, also known as the cotton-root or cottony-root, is a plant species in the family Menispermaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antidiarrheal activities. The health benefits of Lasiorrhiza gossypina include treating fever, diarrhea, and other gastrointestinal issues, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. The plant is traditionally prepared as a decoction or infusion by boiling the roots in water, and it is also used in some herbal preparations to treat various ailments.
